text:
is a young girl who was present during Bald's terrorist attack on the train from Eastern Amestris to Central City. She, along with her unnamed mother, are exclusive to the 2003 anime.

Appearance

]] Marin is shown to be a rather short girl with light orangey-brown hair that stops above her shoulders and blue eyes. Her hair is also shown to be straight, while her mother's hair is dark brown and wavy, and is also shown to have green eyes, so it's possible Marin inherited her physical features from her father.

She is shown to wear a pink version of the same outfit her mother wears, wearing a pink open cardigan with a red collar and a long pink skirt that goes a bit below her knees. She's also shown to wear a white undershirt tucked into her skirt with a red ribbon bowtie at the neck and a pair of red Mary Janes.

Her mother wears the exact same outfit, except her cardigan and skirt are both a light green, and her cardigan is buttoned with white buttons and has a matching white collar. She also wears long dangling purple earrings.

Her age is never stated, but she appears to be taller than both Elicia Hughes and Nina Tucker, likely making her closer to Selim Bradley's age.

History

 While Edward and Alphonse are riding a train to meet with Colonel Roy Mustang in Central City, they end up feeling uncomfortable as they notice they're being stared at for looking odd. Alphonse in particular gets self-conscious due to his armour looking "scary". One of the people who take notice of the brothers is a young girl in the next seat over named Marin, although it quickly becomes clear that she is interested in their odd traits due to innocent curiosity rather than judging them. Edward shows off his automail, stating it's "cooler than skin", to which she nods and smiles in agreement. Her mother, worried she's bothering the boys, tells her to sit down and stop bothering the brothers, although not before both mother and daughter smile at them.

 Marin is next seen during the attack on the train, cowering in fear and crying while clutching onto her mother. One of the robbers who the brothers had knocked to the floor suddenly pulls a gun and aims it at Marin, but Alphonse manages to stop him and Edward confiscates his gun. Edward apologises for the gunshot and assures Marin that her 'big brothers' will take care of things, to which she nods. She is last seen near the end of the episode after Bald and his men have been apprehended, standing with her mother behind a railing with the other passengers who had been held hostage on the train. She waves to Edward and Alphonse while giggling, eventually appreciatively yelling, "Thank you Big Brothers! I'll remember you! Thank you! Thank you!"
